zh.Luffness, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾盧福福斯
zh.Aberlady, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾阿拉迪
zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness於1178年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾盧福福斯時，他的父親William de Lindsay31歲，母親Eleanor Limesi23歲。他於1203年之前與Avice de Lancaster在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1236年在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾阿拉迪享年58歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Luffness, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: 苏格兰哈丁頓史爾盧福福斯
zh-hans.Aberlady, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: 苏格兰哈丁頓史爾阿拉迪
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness于1178年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾盧福福斯时，他的父亲William de Lindsay31岁，母亲Eleanor Limesi23岁。他于1203年之前与Avice de Lancaster在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1236年在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾阿拉迪享年58岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness was born in 1178, in Luffness, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, William de Lindsay, was 31 and his mother, Eleanor Limesi, was 23. He married Avice de Lancaster before 1203, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1236, in Aberlady, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 58, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness est né en 1178, à Luffness, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, William de Lindsay, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Limesi, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Avice de Lancaster avant 1203, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1236, à Aberlady, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness 1178 in Luffness, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Lindsay 31 und seine Mutter Eleanor Limesi 23. Er hat vor 1203 in Scotland Avice de Lancaster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1236 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Aberlady, Haddingtonshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness è nato il nel 1178 nel Luffness, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, William de Lindsay, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Limesi, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Avice de Lancaster prima del 1203, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1236, nel Aberlady, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.Luffness, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアルフネス
ja.Aberlady, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアアバーラディ
ja.lifeSummary: William de Lindsay Lord of Luffnessが1178年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアルフネスで生まれた時，父William de Lindsayは31歳，母Eleanor Limesiは23歳であった。1203年以前にスコットランドでAvice de Lancasterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1236年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアアバーラディで58歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness(이)가 1178년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 루프네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Lindsay(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Limesi(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1203년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Avice de Lancaster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1236년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 압를레이디에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness nasceu em 1178, em Luffness, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, William de Lindsay, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Limesi, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Avice de Lancaster antes 1203, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1236, em Aberlady, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness родился в 1178 г. в местности луффнесс, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William de Lindsay было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Limesi, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Avice de Lancaster перед 1203 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1236 г. в местности абирледи, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness nació en 1178, en Luffness, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, William de Lindsay, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Eleanor Limesi, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Avice de Lancaster antes de 1203, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1236, en Aberlady, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
